pages.text:
LendBridge Capital Corp.
Q4 2024 Quarterly Credit Review

Period Ended: Q4 2024

LendBridge Capital Corp. is a specialty finance platform providing working capital solutions to SMEs across North America.

Condensed Income Summary

| Item | Q4 2024 |
| --- | --- |
| Recognized Revenue | $11.4M |
| Interest Expense | ($3.1M) |
| Net Interest Margin | 9.1% |
| Fee & Ancillary Income | $0.9M |
| Gross Margin | 60% |

Credit Portfolio Indicators

| Metric | Q4 2024 |
| --- | --- |
| Total Loan Book (gross) | $291M |
| Active Borrowers | 1,310 |
| Average Loan Size | $78k |
| Credit Loss Rate(LTM) | 3.6% |
| Balance Sheet Leverage | 2.9x |
| Senior Covenant Headroom | +118bps |
| Total Headcount | 175 |

Portfolio Composition Commentary

Average loan size increased to $78k in Q4 2024, up from an average of $74k in Q3 2024, reflecting continued migration of the book
toward larger working capital facilities in the Manufacturing and Services segments. Total gross outstanding balances reached
$291M at quarter end.

(1) Credit Loss Rate replaces 'Net Charge-off Rate' terminology; calculated equivalently on a last-twelve-months basis.

(2) Adjusted Operating Margin is not reported this quarter; refer to Gross Margin and NIM for profitability.

(3) Gross Margin reflects net interest income net of cost of funds; excludes provisions and operating expenses.
